unified_frame_statement: Tom shares his leap of faith with Coach Jennifer, showing how answering the call to change helped him overcome comfortable stagnation and embrace an exciting new chapter.

state_alpha.internal_monologue: "Maybe next year. It's not the right time."
state_alpha.sensory_anchor: The dulling sensation of the same commute for 15 years

the_abyss.realization: "He waited too long. I can't make the same mistake."

the_spark.insight_quote: "She said 'What would 80-year-old you regret NOT doing?' I knew immediately." (17:22)

state_omega.action: Building passion project while transitioning careers

sensory_anchors: The grey monotony of the old office cubicle
The flutter of excitement during the leap planning
The vibrant energy of his new studio space now
